payload.answer: The proposed memory is too ambiguous to save because the pronoun “He” and the referent “the other one” are unresolved. Please clarify who and what this refers to.
repair_options: Specify the person: replace “He” with the person’s name or identity.
Specify the preference target: replace “the other one” with the exact item, option, product, or choice being preferred.
Provide the original comparison context so the preference can be rewritten unambiguously.
Do not save this memory unless both the subject and preferred item are clarified.
